version_description: Based on Live performance June 17th 1993. https://youtu.be/vV8k1PzoSPc.

performance.name: Live in Germany
performance.comment: This song was yet to be released at the time of this show.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Still Crazy After All These Years

content:
Melissa Etheridge - I'm The Only One
Live in Cologne, Germany - June 17th, 1993
https://youtu.be/vV8k1PzoSPc


Define:
[ch]G5[/ch]   355xxx
[ch]F5[/ch]   133xxx

| *  = Lick 1
| ** = Lick 2

All parts tabbed are Melissa's except the lead in to the 2nd part of the intro after the rest.


[Intro]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]                                                 *
Please baby can't you see, my mind's a burnin' hell.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]                                                                     **
I got razors a rippin' and tearin' and strippin' my heart apart as well.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]                                                  *
Tonight you told me, that you ache for something new[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]                                                                       **
And some other woman is lookin' like something that might be good for you[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                            [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
 Go on and hold her 'till the screaming is gone[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
 Go on believe her when she tells you nothing's wrong[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
 But I'm the only one, who'll walk across the fire for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
 And I'm the only one, who'll drown in my desire for you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]                                [ch]C[/ch]
It's only fear that makes you run, the demons that you're hiding from[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G5[/ch]
When all your promises are gone. I'm the only one...[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]                                              *
Please baby can't you see, I'm trying to explain.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]                                                                         **
I've been here before and I'm locking the door and I'm not going back again.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]                                              *
Her eyes and arms and skin won't make it go away.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]                                                                      **
You'll wake up tomorrow and wrestle the sorrow that holds you down today.[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                            [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
 Go on and hold her 'till the screaming is gone[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
 Go on believe her when she tells you nothing's wrong[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
 But, I'm the only one, who'll walk across the fire for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
 And, I'm the only one, who'll drown in my desire for you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]                                [ch]C[/ch]
It's only fear that makes you run, the demons that you're hiding from.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G5[/ch]
When all your promises are gone, I'm the only one...[/tab]
